scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,admin -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --workspace apps/web" "npm run dev --workspace apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace apps/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/web && npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/web && npm run lint --workspace apps/api && npm run lint --workspace apps/admin
